summary: Website project with a Survey page. Survey content has been removed and replaced with a static placeholder message. No survey scripts, API calls, or widgets load on the Survey page.
architectural_notes: Survey page retains its layout, header, and design but displays a static placeholder: 'Surveys are currently unavailable. Please check back later.' No survey scripts, API calls, or widgets should load on this page.

Preserve the existing page layout, header section, card container styling, and overall design.

projectName: Remove survey embed and replace with static placeholder on Survey page
